crie.note: Sequence per §156. No shortcuts; full sequence executes (non-bypass §599/§608). No Sprint 7 (WF-004 Output Generation) logic present.

nodes.name: Receive Context Package
nodes.notes: §156 Trigger: Context Package (§294) from WF-002 / Sprint 5.

nodes.name: SW-022 Load Prompt (PR-004)
nodes.notes: §262/§175/§176. Loads PR-004 v1.0 from Prompt Registry and injects variables. Prompts SHALL NOT be embedded in the workflow (§86).

nodes.name: SW-023 Enterprise LLM
nodes.notes: §263/R-11. Produces explanation + evidenceMapping ONLY via the Provider Adapter layer. Does NOT decide complianceLevel or confidence.

nodes.name: Derive Level + Confidence
nodes.notes: R-10 / R-11. modelSelfConfidence and suggestedLevel are advisory input only.

nodes.name: SW-024 Output Validator
nodes.notes: §264/§90/§298/§493/§494. JSON valid, required fields, citations, confidence, compliance level; hallucination detection; self-validation. Invalid -> retry (§264).

nodes.name: Self-Validation Gate
nodes.notes: §494: invalid output SHALL be regenerated (loops back to SW-023 up to maxRetries).

nodes.name: Return Compliance Result
nodes.notes: §156/§295. Emits the single canonical Compliance Result contract (R-03).

nodes.name: Regenerate (retry)
nodes.notes: Loops back to SW-023 while attempts remain (§264/§494).
